sections.paragraph:
ψευδόχριστος, ου, ὁ one who, in lying fashion, gives himself out to be the Anointed One, a bogus Messiah (cp. Ψευδοφίλιππος Diod S 32, 15, 7; 32; Fgm. 9a and b; Strabo 13, 4, 2; Ψευδονέρων Lucian, Adv. Indoct. 20; Ψευδομάριος Appian, Bell. Civ. 3, 2 §2) pl. Mt 24:24; Mk 13:22 (both w. ψευδοπροφῆται). On the subj. s. Bousset, Rel.3 223f.—DELG s.v. ψεύδομαι and cp. χρίω.

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Strabo Strabo , I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

Appian Appian , I–II a.d.—List 5

  1. pl. = plural

subj. subj. = subjunctive; subject

Bousset, Rel. Bousset, Rel. = WB., D. Religion des Judentums im neutestamentlichen Zeitalter—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1097
